text: I feel a quiet anticipation, tinged with unease. The dim corridor evokes a sense of emptiness—an in-between space, neither here nor there. Entering the next room, the R+D wall and glowing text draw me in. I become aware of my own presence as both observer and participant, reflecting on the words about being watched and the boundary between observer and observed. The technology displayed feels like a mirror, asking me to examine my awareness and my willingness to connect. I feel exposed, yet curiously engaged.
